---
title: "Team"
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.grid style="align-items: start;"}
::: {.g-col-3}
![](assets/images/protrait_zy.jpeg)
:::
::: {.g-col-9}
### Prof. Zhou Yang
**Assistant Professor at the University of Alberta, Fellow at Amii (Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute)**

Dr. Zhou Yang is an Assistant Professor at the University of Alberta and a Fellow at the Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute (Amii). He received his Ph.D. from Singapore Management University and his M.Sc. from University College London. His research focuses on building strong foundation models for complex software systems, developing trusted AI for software engineering, and analyzing the socio-technical impact of AI on open-source software and developer productivity.

[📧 zy25@ualberta.ca](mailto:zy25@ualberta.ca) | [🔗 Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=4oWBhPsAAAAJ&hl=en) | [🌐 Homepage](https://homepage.zhouyang.me/)
:::
:::

---

## Graduate Students

::: {.grid style="align-items: start;"}
::: {.g-col-3}
![](assets/images/protrait_hz.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-9}
### Hanzheng (Hozier) Dai
**PhD Student** · Joined 2026

Research interests: Testing game compatibility layer

[📧 hanzhen3@ualberta.ca](mailto:hanzhen3@ualberta.ca) | [🌐 Homepage](https://hozierddd.github.io/)
:::
:::

::: {.grid style="align-items: start;"}
::: {.g-col-3}
![](assets/images/protrait_zixi.jpg)
:::
::: {.g-col-9}
### Zixi Chai
**Master Student** · Joined 2026

Research interests: Testing game compatibility layer

[📧 zchai3@ualberta.ca](mailto:zchai3@ualberta.ca)

[//]: # (---)

[//]: # ()
[//]: # (## Alumni)

[//]: # ()
[//]: # (| Name | Degree | Year | Current Position |)

[//]: # (|------|--------|------|-----------------|)

[//]: # (| [Name] | PhD | 202X | [Position, Institution] |)

<style>
.grid .g-col-9 h3:first-child {
  margin-top: 0;
  padding-top: 0;
}
.grid .g-col-3 p {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}
#graduate-students .grid {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
</style>
